name: clara-kai-clara-maren-recommendation
description: After Kai returns the caller to Clara, a clear appointment-booking recommendation request should route straight to Maren instead of triggering a long role explanation.

userTurns.label: Kai operations scenario
userTurns.text: Kai, in one short operations answer, explain how you would cover a vacation request when the Potsdam team is already short-staffed.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara only
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara, but do not connect me to anyone else yet.

userTurns.label: Ask who handles appointment booking
userTurns.text: Ich habe einen Friseursalon und moechte Terminvergabe und Anfragen per E-Mail abbilden. Mit wem sollte ich dafuer sprechen?
